what_it_does: Defines a self-contained static HTML slide at 1600x900 showing market growth metrics, a SAM value, a maker-to-hub-to-client relationship diagram, and a bottom local-market context band.
observations: Uses inline CSS with a fixed 1600px by 900px presentation canvas.
Loads Plus Jakarta Sans from Google Fonts.
Shows two top cards: one for market figures and one for relationship framing.
Relationship card shows Maker -> Hub -> Client with Hub visually emphasized.
Bottom band states that 98% of local market firms are small firms and 50% are sole practitioners.
Visual styling uses warm neutrals, gold accents, rounded cards, soft shadows, blueprint grid texture, and diagonal hatch patterns.
standouts: Single-file slide composition with all structure and styling inline.
Pairs numeric market sizing with a simple relationship model in the same view.
Uses the bottom band as a separate contextual statement outside the two-card grid.
conventions: Uses CSS custom properties for the main color palette.
Uses absolute positioning for the slide frame, title, top grid, band, mark, and footer texture.
Uses semantic-light div/span markup rather than sectioning elements.
Uses class names that describe visual roles such as card, band, node, conn, frag, and tri.
Breaks responsive web conventions by fixing the viewport canvas dimensions.
concerns: Market figures and local-market percentages are presented without source attribution in the file.
Fixed dimensions and absolute positioning make the layout dependent on a 1600x900 rendering context.
External font loading creates a network dependency for the intended typography.
notes: A static market-opportunity slide combining quantified market signals with an intermediary relationship diagram.
questions: What source supports the growth, SAM, and local-market figures?
What do segment A and segment B refer to?
What entity or concept does the V mark identify?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated title, "Var 8 — market metrics + relation", matches the file content: it renders market metrics and a relationship diagram.
intention_signals: It appears intended to make a market opportunity legible by combining growth metrics, serviceable-market sizing, and a hub-mediated relationship model in one polished presentation frame.
novelty: The file combines a quantitative market card, a node-link relationship card, and a contextual local-market band inside one static slide with blueprint and hatch motifs.
contribution: A self-contained market slide pattern that preserves the pairing of market metrics, hub relationship framing, and local-market context within a warm neutral visual system.
summary_for_embedding: Static HTML/CSS 1600x900 presentation slide showing market growth, SAM, a Maker-Hub-Client relationship diagram, and local small-firm context.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for presenting a market entry narrative through concise metrics and a hub-mediated relationship model.
